term: kick someone when they are down
englishDefinitions: (idiomatic) To make things worse for someone who is going through a difficult time.
persianTranslation: (اصطلاحا) بدتر کردن اوضاع برای کسی که دوران سختی را پشت سر می گذارد.
synonyms: kick a dog when it's down
strike someone when they are down
hit someone when they are down
